item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Launches Missile Barrage at Israel, First Since Ceasefire
item.description: Iran fired missiles at Israel in retaliation for Israeli strikes on Beirut, marking the first such attack since the Middle East ceasefire. Israel's air defenses are actively intercepting the incoming threats.

item.title: ⚔️ Russian Strike Hits Bus Stop in Zaporizhzhia, Three Civilians Killed
item.description: A Russian strike on the settlement of Balabyne in Zaporizhzhia Oblast killed three people and injured three others. The attack targeted civilian infrastructure.

item.title: 🌍 Malawi Begins Evacuation of Nationals From South Africa Amid Xenophobia Crisis
item.description: The Government of Malawi announced a voluntary repatriation exercise for its nationals displaced in South Africa, with the first 150 citizens returning home as xenophobic violence spreads.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Arrives in London for E3 Talks With European Leaders
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in London for bilateral and E3 talks focusing on Ukraine's defense and European security, following a Russian drone strike on Chernobyl nuclear facility.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea Declares Nuclear Program Irreversible Ahead of Xi Jinping Visit
item.description: Kim Yo-jong, sister of North Korean leader Kim Jong Un, rejected US denuclearization efforts as 'anachronistic' just one day before Chinese President Xi Jinping's arrival in Pyongyang.

item.title: 🛢️💰 OPEC+ Approves Fourth Oil Output Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC+ agreed to its fourth oil production increase in as many months despite the ongoing US-Iran conflict, approving a 188,000 barrel-per-day hike to compensate for Hormuz Strait disruptions.

item.title: 🇽🇰🗳️ Kosovo Election: Kurti Party Leads With 43.72%
item.description: Preliminary results show Prime Minister Albin Kurti Vetevendosje party leading Kosovo early parliamentary election, the third vote in 18 months amid political impasse.

item.title: 🇳🇵🇮🇳 Nepal FM Signals Diplomatic Approach to India Border Row
item.description: Nepal Foreign Minister Shisir Khanal said no boundary is too complex if tackled with an open heart, signaling a diplomatic push to resolve territorial disputes with India and strengthen bilateral ties.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇮🇱 Iran fires missiles at Israel for first time since April ceasefire
item.description: Israel struck Beirut's southern suburbs on Sunday, prompting Iran to launch missiles at Israeli territory. The attack marks a major escalation after weeks of fragile ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang for summit with Kim Jong Un
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping visits North Korea as Kim Jong Un projects confidence with firm Russian ties and nuclear arsenal, showing little appetite for engagement with Washington.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇧 US considers buying Chagos Islands from Mauritius
item.description: The White House is weighing a plan to purchase the strategically important Chagos Islands from Mauritius, the Telegraph reports.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇵🇸 France threatens more sanctions on Israeli settlers over West Bank violence
item.description: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noel Barrot warns that additional sanctions could be imposed on Israeli settlers in coming days in response to illegal settlement expansion and violence against Palestinians.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇫 Central African Republic agrees to accept third-country deportees from US
item.description: The Trump administration strikes a deal with Central African Republic to accept migrants from other countries deported by the US, the latest in a series of opaque agreements with African states.

item.title: 🇺🇦 The Atlantic: Ukraine Not Losing, Russia Not Winning as Momentum Shifts
item.description: Gulf states and others now understand that the Russian narrative is wrong. Ukrainians continue to resist as the war enters a new phase with drone warfare reshaping the front lines.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Asserts Maritime Rights as Regional Tensions Escalate
item.description: Taiwan emphasized that its rights over territorial waters and exclusive economic zone must not be violated by any country, amid heightened regional tensions in the Taiwan Strait.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 CBS News: Iran Accuses US of Ceasefire Violation as Stalemate Continues
item.description: US military reports shooting down four Iranian drones headed toward Strait of Hormuz overnight. Peace talks remain deadlocked as both sides exchange accusations.

item.title: ⚓ Female Navy Officers Fear Career Cap After Hegseth Cuts Women From Promotions
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth removed all women from a Navy promotion list, raising concerns about gender discrimination in the military and impacting career trajectories for female officers.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Military Tearing Its Hair Out as Labour Dithering Endangers National Security
item.description: Critics condemn Labour government failure to strengthen British Armed Forces while war rages in Europe, with calls for urgent defence investment amid growing Russian threat.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Armenians vote in pivotal election with Russia-West tensions in focus
item.description: Prime Minister Pashinyan's pro-Western ruling party faces opposition candidates favoring closer ties with Russia, in a vote that could reshape the South Caucasus country's geopolitical alignment.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo XIV draws 1.2 million to Madrid Mass, challenges Europe on Christian roots
item.description: Over a million people filled Madrid's streets for Pope Leo's outdoor Mass, where he urged Europe to acknowledge Christianity's contributions to its cultural identity and said God stands with the poor.

item.title: 🇿🇦 South Africa's Ramaphosa vows crackdown on xenophobic violence amid migration tensions
item.description: President Ramaphosa announced tougher immigration enforcement and penalties for employers hiring undocumented workers, while distancing the government from vigilante immigration checks.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's negotiator threatens US bases and Israeli assets over Lebanon escalation
item.description: Iran's top negotiator declared US bases and Israeli assets in the Middle East "legitimate targets" following Israel's strikes on Beirut and the US naval blockade of Iran.

item.title: ☢️ US pushes IAEA resolution demanding Iran account for bombed nuclear sites
item.description: The US is lobbying countries on the IAEA Board to back a resolution requiring Iran to disclose what happened to its bombed nuclear facilities and enriched uranium stocks.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Coast Guard Expels Chinese Ships from Restricted Waters
item.description: Taiwan's coast guard expelled four Chinese government vessels that entered restricted waters off the island's south, with both sides exchanging warnings in a rare escalation of tensions across the Taiwan Strait.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan-Administered Kashmir Court Clears Path for Refugee Elections
item.description: The top court in Pakistan-administered Kashmir upheld 12 legislative seats reserved for Kashmiri refugees, clearing the way for upcoming elections in the disputed territory.
